title: ADP vs Zoho People
description: Compare ADP vs Zoho People in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right hr & people tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Zoho People emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.2/5 rating compared to 4/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, ADP or Zoho People?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Zoho People edges ahead with a 4.2/5 rating. ADP excels at ADP is the world's largest payroll and HR services provider, processing payroll , while Zoho People is stronger for Cloud HR management platform for growing businesses..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between ADP and Zoho People?
faqs.answer: ADP and Zoho People differ in pricing (Custom vs $3-10/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is ADP cheaper than Zoho People?
faqs.answer: ADP starts at Custom while Zoho People starts at $3-10/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, ADP or Zoho People?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for hr & people. Zoho People scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use ADP and Zoho People together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, ADP or Zoho People?
faqs.answer: Both ADP and Zoho People prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which hr & people tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor ADP for large teams, while Zoho People may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Custom pricing.
